name: pytest-asyncio
description: Pytest plugin providing fixtures and decorators for testing asynchronous Python code using asyncio, including async fixtures and event loop management.

seo.title: pytest-asyncio — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: pytest-asyncio: Pytest plugin providing fixtures and decorators for testing asynchronous Python code using asyncio, including async fixtures and event loop mana

when_to_use: Test asyncio coroutines with async def test functions
Async fixtures for database connections and HTTP clients
Event loop configuration for FastAPI and aiohttp tests
Scope-aware async fixture management in test suites

pros: Standard choice for async Python testing
Event loop control per test or session
cons: Configuration around loop scope confuses newcomers
review.verdict: Essential for async Python tests, but expect to re-read the changelog every upgrade due to config churn.
review.best_for: Python teams testing asyncio-based code with FastAPI, aiohttp, or httpx
review.not_for: Projects avoiding async altogether or using anyio's built-in plugin
